title: Vetcare hosts third annual charity fun run 'The Cat Walk’ to support animals in need
description: GEORGE NEWS - Animal lovers, lace up those...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Animal lovers, lace up those running shoes. Vetcare Animal Clinic’s third annual charity fun run, “The Cat Walk”, is back on Saturday 6 September, and it’s set to be bigger and better than ever.


> The event kicks off at the Botanical Garden's gate, with registration from 13:00 and the run starting at 14:00. Entry is just R50 per person.


For those wanting to sell or showcase goods, stall spaces are available for R150 each – but there are only 30 spots, so early booking is essential.

Expect loads of lucky draws, prizes in various categories, and the satisfaction of knowing your participation will directly help animals in need.

Pets are welcome, provided they are kept on a leash.Event details:Date: Saturday, 6 September 2025Venue: Botanical Garden Gate, GeorgeRegistration: 13:00 | Start: 14:00Entry fee: R50 per personStalls: R150 (only 30 available)

Contact: 044 873 3585 | [email protected]

Let’s walk together for a cause worth every stride.

Pets are welcome, provided they are kept on a leash.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
